title: Coinbase Global (COIN): Why Prediction Markets Matter
text: Prediction markets represent significant opportunity for Coinbase in 2026, expected to generate record $240 billion in trading volume. Company integrated prediction markets into Everything Exchange platform, expanding addressable market beyond traditional crypto traders. Prediction markets appeal to broader investor base interested in event-driven trading and hedging. Coinbase positioned as leading platform for prediction market activity with user base, institutional relationships, and regulatory clarity advantages. Revenue contribution from prediction markets expected to become material as volume grows. Integration with other Coinbase products, including derivatives and stablecoins, creates network effects. Analyst consensus suggests prediction markets will accelerate Coinbase revenue growth in 2026.
